nasb.text: Please let a little water be brought and wash your feet, and rest yourselves under the tree;

esv.text: Let a little water be brought, and wash your feet, and rest yourselves under the tree,

cnv.text: 讓我叫人拿點水來，你們可以洗洗腳，然後在樹下歇一歇。

ccb.text: 我让人拿点水来，你们洗洗脚，在树下歇一会儿。

csbs.text: 请让我拿点水来，你们可以洗洗脚，在树底下休息。
